name: General Practice
shortDescription: Comprehensive primary healthcare for adults and children, including diagnosis and treatment of common illnesses.
fullDescription: Our General Practice service provides comprehensive primary care for patients of all ages. Our experienced general practitioners handle everything from routine check-ups to diagnosis and treatment of common illnesses such as fever, infections, respiratory conditions, gastrointestinal issues, and more. We take a patient-centered approach to ensure you receive the care you need quickly and effectively.
features: Diagnosis and treatment of common illnesses
